'''thamusu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicca|nicca]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-m-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicca|nicca]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| thamusu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thæmisith|thæmisith]] || [[word:thæmisij|thæmisij]] || [[word:thæmisish|thæmisish]] || [[word:thæmisi|thæmisi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thamumusuth|thamumusuth]] || [[word:thamumusuj|thamumusuj]] || [[word:thamumusush|thamumusush]] || [[word:thamumusu|thamumusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thamusuth|thamusuth]] || [[word:thamusuj|thamusuj]] || [[word:thamusush|thamusush]] || [[word:thamusu|thamusu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thamufsuth|thamufsuth]] || [[word:thamufsuj|thamufsuj]] || [[word:thamufsush|thamufsush]] || [[word:thamufsuf|thamufsuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:thamusuthu|thamusuthu]] || [[word:thamusuju|thamusuju]] || [[word:thamusushu|thamusushu]] || [[word:thamusuku|thamusuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:thamusuth|thamusuth]] || [[word:thamusuj|thamusuj]] || [[word:thamusush|thamusush]] || [[word:thamusu|thamusu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:thamusuthul|thamusuthul]] || [[word:thamusujul|thamusujul]] || [[word:thamusushul|thamusushul]] || [[word:thamusukul|thamusukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:thamusuthuthu|thamusuthuthu]] || [[word:thamusujuju|thamusujuju]] || [[word:thamusushushu|thamusushushu]] || [[word:thamusuku|thamusuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:thamusuthun|thamusuthun]] || [[word:thamusujun|thamusujun]] || [[word:thamusushun|thamusushun]] || [[word:thamusukun|thamusukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:thamusuthuoro|thamusuthuoro]] || [[word:thamusujuoro|thamusujuoro]] || [[word:thamusushuoro|thamusushuoro]] || [[word:thamusukuoro|thamusukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
